lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਨਮੁ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਮੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਖੁਆਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har naam na paaeaa janam birathaa gavaaeaa naanak jam maar kare khuaar |2|
lines.english: They do not obtain the Lord's Name, and they waste away their lives in vain; O Nanak, the Messenger of Death punishes and dishonors them. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਦਹੁ ਆਕਾਸੁ ਨ ਪਾਤਾਲੁ ਹੈ ਨਾ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਲੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: tadahu aakaas na paataal hai naa trai loee |
lines.english: At that time, there were no Akaashic Ethers, no nether regions, nor the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਆਪੁ ਉਪਾਇਓਨੁ ਤਦਹੁ ਹੋਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aapanaa aap upaaeon tadahu hor na koee |
lines.english: He created Himself - at that time, there was no other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਾ ਮਸੂਰਤਿ ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਜੋ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: mataa masoorat aap kare jo kare su hoee |
lines.english: He consulted Himself for advice, and what He did came to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਕਰੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jiau tis bhaavai tivai kare tis bin avar na koee |1|
lines.english: As it pleased Him, so did He act; without Him, there was no other. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਦਹੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਨਾ ਓਪਤਿ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: tadahu aape aap nirankaar hai naa opat hoee |
lines.english: At that time, only the Formless Lord Himself existed - there was no creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਦਾ ਹੈ ਦਿਸੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saahib meraa sadaa hai disai sabad kamaae |
lines.english: My Master is eternal. He is seen by practicing the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਅਉਹਾਣੀ ਕਦੇ ਨਾਹਿ ਨਾ ਆਵੈ ਨਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ohu aauhaanee kade naeh naa aavai naa jaae |
lines.english: He never perishes; He does not come or go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਕਿਉ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਜੰਮੈ ਤੈ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: avar doojaa kiau seveeai jamai tai mar jaae |
lines.english: Why serve another who is born, and then dies?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸੋ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਜੋ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa so seveeai jo sabh meh rahai samaae |
lines.english: So serve Him, forever and ever; He is contained in all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਫਲੁ ਤਿਨ ਕਾ ਜੀਵਿਆ ਜਿ ਖਸਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਅਵਰੀ ਕਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: nihafal tin kaa jeeviaa ji khasam na jaaneh aapanaa avaree kau chit laae |
lines.english: Fruitless is the life of those who do not know their Lord and Master, and who center their consciousness on others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਭੋ ਵਰਤੈ ਸਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa naam dhiaaeeai sabho varatai sach |
lines.english: Meditate on the True Name; the True Lord is pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਏਵ ਨ ਜਾਪਈ ਕਰਤਾ ਕੇਤੀ ਦੇਇ ਸਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ev na jaapee karataa ketee dee sajaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, it cannot be known, how much punishment the Creator shall inflict on them. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥਨੀ ਬਦਨੀ ਕਰਤਾ ਫਿਰੈ ਹੁਕਮੈ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਬੁਝਈ ਅੰਧਾ ਕਚੁ ਨਿਕਚੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kathanee badanee karataa firai hukamai mool na bujhee andhaa kach nikach |2|
lines.english: He wanders around babbling and speaking, but he does not understand the Lord's Command at all. He is blind, the falsest of the false. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਬੁਝਿ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹੋਇ ਤਾ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਸਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak hukam bujh paravaan hoe taa fal paavai sach |
lines.english: O Nanak, by understanding the Hukam of the Lord's Command, one becomes acceptable, and then obtains the fruit of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ਵਿਜੋਗੁ ਉਪਾਇਓਨੁ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟੀ ਕਾ ਮੂਲੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sanjog vijog upaaeon srisattee kaa mool rachaaeaa |
lines.english: Creating union and separation, He laid the foundations of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਾਜੀਅਨੁ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hukamee srisatt saajeean jotee jot milaaeaa |
lines.english: By His Command, the Lord of Light fashioned the Universe, and infused His Divine Light into it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਬਿਸਨੁ ਮਹੇਸੁ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਸਿਰਿ ਧੰਧੈ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: brahamaa bisan mahes trai gun sir dhandhai laaeaa |
lines.english: Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva, under the influence of the three dispositions, were put to their tasks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤੀ ਹੂੰ ਸਭੁ ਚਾਨਣਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jotee hoon sabh chaananaa satigur sabad sunaaeaa |
lines.english: From the Lord of Light, all light originates. The True Guru proclaims the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾ ਮੂਲੁ ਰਚਾਇਓਨੁ ਤੁਰੀਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: maaeaa kaa mool rachaaeon tureea sukh paaeaa |2|
lines.english: He created the root of Maya, and the peace obtained in the fourth state of consciousness. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਗੁਰ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak aap chhodd gur maeh samaavai |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, renouncing self-conceit, one merges into the Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kai bhaanai vaddiaaee paavai |
lines.english: Pleasing the True Guru, glorious greatness is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜਪੁ ਸੋ ਤਪੁ ਜਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: so jap so tap ji satigur bhaavai |
lines.english: That alone is chanting, and that alone is deep meditation, which is pleasing to the True Guru.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਦੇਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jis aap vaddiaaee devai |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, he alone receives it, whom the Lord Himself blesses with glorious greatness. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਿਖ ਕੋ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਲੇਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee sikh ko viralaa levai |
lines.english: How rare are those who receive the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਥਰ ਪਾਪ ਬਹੁ ਲਦਿਆ ਕਿਉ ਤਰੀਐ ਤਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: pathar paap bahu ladiaa kiau tareeai taaree |
lines.english: Loaded with so very many stones of sin, how can the boat cross over?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਹੈ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਅਤਿ ਭਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu agiaan hai bikham at bhaaree |
lines.english: Emotional attachment to Maya is spiritual darkness; it is very difficult and such a heavy load.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਛਡਿ ਵਿਕਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee man niramalaa haumai chhadd vikaaree |
lines.english: Under the Instruction of the Guru's Shabad, one sheds egotism and corruption, and the mind becomes immaculate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: anadin bhagatee ratiaa har paar utaaree |
lines.english: Those who are attuned to the Lord's devotional worship night and day are carried across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬੀਰ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਸੰਕੁੜਾ ਰਾਈ ਦਸਵੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kabeer mukat duaaraa sankurraa raaee dasavai bhaae |
lines.english: O Kabeer, the gate of liberation is narrow, less than one-tenth of a mustard seed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har har naam dhiaaeeai har har nisataaree |3|
lines.english: Meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har; the Lord, Har, Har, is our Saving Grace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਤੁਠਾ ਕਰੇ ਪਸਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aisaa satigur je milai tutthaa kare pasaau |
lines.english: If one meets such a True Guru, by His Pleasure, He shows His Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਉ ਮੈਗਲੁ ਹੋਇ ਰਹਾ ਨਿਕਸਿਆ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tau maigal hoe rahaa nikasiaa kiau kar jaae |
lines.english: The mind has become as big as an elephant; how can it pass through this gate?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਤਿ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਮੋਕਲਾ ਸਹਜੇ ਆਵਉ ਜਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mukat duaaraa mokalaa sahaje aavau jaau |1|
lines.english: Then, the gate of liberation becomes wide open, and the soul easily passes through. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਅਤਿ ਨੀਕਾ ਨਾਨੑਾ ਹੋਇ ਸੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak mukat duaaraa at neekaa naanaa hoe su jaae |
lines.english: O Nanak, the gate of liberation is very narrow; only the very tiny can pass through.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਨੁ ਅਸਥੂਲੁ ਹੈ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਵਿਚੁ ਦੇ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai man asathool hai kiau kar vich de jaae |
lines.english: Through egotism, the mind has become bloated. How can it pass through?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਹਉਮੈ ਗਈ ਜੋਤਿ ਰਹੀ ਸਭ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai haumai gee jot rahee sabh aae |
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, egotism departs, and one is filled with the Divine Light.
